recommendations.title: The Devil's Tomb
recommendations.overview: Captain Mack leads an elite military unit on a search for a missing scientist, and comes face-to-face with an an ancient evil lying beneath the Middle Eastern desert. Evil that is not of this world. Evil that should never be unearthed.

recommendations.title: Alien Outpost
recommendations.overview: A documentary crew follows an elite unit of soldiers in the wake of an alien invasion.

recommendations.title: The Jurassic Games
recommendations.overview: In the near future, 10 death row convicts are forced to compete in a virtual reality game that pits them against dinosaurs and each other.

recommendations.title: War Machine
recommendations.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

recommendations.title: Age of Heroes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the formation of Ian Fleming's 30 Commando unit, a precursor for the elite forces in the U.K.

recommendations.title: The Platform
recommendations.overview: A slab of food descends down a vertical facility. The residents above eat heartily, leaving those below starving and desperate. A rebellion is imminent.

recommendations.title: Interview with a Hitman
recommendations.overview: An elite hitman returns to erase his past only to find that somebody has messed with his future.

recommendations.title: The Dawns Here Are Quiet
recommendations.overview: In a remote village in Karelia, Sergeant Vaskov commands an anti-aircraft unit that protects a rail depot. While his men are transferred to the front line, he is reprimanded for their unruly behavior. He retorts that he wants replacements that aren't

recommendations.title: Doom: Annihilation
recommendations.overview: A group of UAC Marines responds to a distress call from a top-secret scientific base on Phobos, a Martian moon, only to discover it's been overrun by demons.

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.
